description: KD provides ketone bodies (BHB, AcAc) as alternative brain fuel bypassing impaired glucose metabolism. Enhances mitochondrial biogenesis and oxidative phosphorylation efficiency.
overlap_with_scz_pathways: Yes - mitochondrial respiration downregulated in SCZ amygdala (PMID:38699334)

description: BHB directly inhibits the NLRP3 inflammasome, a key driver of neuroinflammation. Reduces microglial activation and pro-inflammatory cytokine signaling.
overlap_with_scz_pathways: Yes - immune/inflammatory pathways enriched in SCZ GSEA; complement C1QA/C1QB altered in brain PPI

description: KD increases GABA synthesis and suppresses GABA catabolism. Affects vesicular glutamate transporters and astrocytic glutamate-glutamine cycle.
overlap_with_scz_pathways: Yes - glutamatergic synapse pathway downregulated in GSE27383 GSEA

description: Drug-naive first-episode SCZ patients show insulin resistance independent of medication. KD reverses IR (Stanford pilot: HOMA-IR -27%).
overlap_with_scz_pathways: Yes - metabolic syndrome 2-3x more prevalent in SCZ
key_references: Sethi PMID:38547601; 26+ studies in drug-naive patients

description: BHB is an endogenous HDAC inhibitor (class I and IIa). Upregulates BDNF, SOD2, catalase, FOXO3a neuroprotective genes.
overlap_with_scz_pathways: Yes - BDNF is a family study candidate gene; SOD2/GPX1 in oxidative stress defense

description: KD increases adenosine which forms functional heteromers with dopamine receptors. Adenosine functionally antagonizes dopamine without direct D2 blockade.
overlap_with_scz_pathways: Yes - DRD2 is PGC3 risk gene; dopamine pathway central to SCZ

description: Ketone bodies modulate astrocyte glutamate recycling, KATP channels, aquaporin-4, and connexin proteins.
overlap_with_scz_pathways: Yes - Layer 1 astrocytes altered in SCZ (PsychENCODE); myelin/glial dysfunction hypothesis
